description:
On the next This Is My Architecture, Joshua from OnScale will explain how he harnesses AWS services to deliver world class high performance compute clusters, on demand, to OnScale's customers. Their work loads are some of the most demanding in the world, computer aided engineering (CAE), or physics-based simulations. OnScale's innovative use of CloudWatch Logs, AWS Lambda, KMS, and EC2 empower OnScale's customers to build the next generation of products faster, cheaper, and more securely than ever before.
